hooks.command: PYBIN="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.venv/Scripts/python.exe"; [ -f "$PYBIN" ] || PYBIN="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.venv/bin/python"; [ -f "$PYBIN" ] || PYBIN="$(where python 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\r' | grep -vi 'WindowsApps' | head -1)"; [ -f "$PYBIN" ] || exit 0; "$PYBIN" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/tools/sdd_gate.py"
